## Summary

<!-- A one-sentence description of what you'd like. -->

## Motivation / problem being solved

<!-- Why do you want this? What problem does it address? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe your preferred solution in as much detail as you can. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you thought of other approaches? Why did you reject them? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to related issues, etc. -->

---

> **Note**: APD is an opinionated personal tool — not every feature will be adopted. If you have a large change in mind, please open a discussion first before writing code.
